description: Synthetic MCI field notes with gold observations and gold SALT categories. No real patient data.

cases.note: Pt 1: adult male, walking around the staging area asking about his friend. Superficial abrasions to forearms only. Talking in full sentences, follows instructions, radial pulse strong, breathing comfortably, no active bleeding.
Pt 2: adult female, closed deformity of right femur, unable to walk. Alert, follows commands. Radial pulse present, breathing unlabored, bleeding controlled with pressure dressing.

Pt 3: teenage male, heavy arterial bleeding from left thigh, tourniquet applied but blood still soaking through. Confused, not following commands. Breathing rapidly and laboring. No radial pulse, carotid only.
Pt 4: adult male found under debris. Airway repositioned twice, no spontaneous respirations.
Pt 5: elderly female, breathing spontaneously. Moves hand away when touched but does not follow commands. Radial pulse weak but present, no visible bleeding, breathing appears comfortable.
Pt 6: adult, breathing. No other assessment documented — crews pulled to another sector.
Pt 7: child, breathing with severe distress, gasping. Follows commands, radial pulse present, no external bleeding.
Pt 8: adult male, ambulatory, laceration to scalp bleeding controlled with dressing. Follows commands, strong radial pulse, breathing normally. Laceration is the only injury found.
Pt 9: adult female, extensive full-thickness burns, breathing spontaneously but shallow with distress, no peripheral pulse, unresponsive to commands.
cases.note_expectant: With an explicit human likely_survivable=false decision this becomes expectant; the algorithm must not make that call on its own.

cases.note: Pt 10: adult male, follows commands, radial pulse intact, breathing without difficulty, no significant bleeding. Injuries not yet fully surveyed.
Pt 11: adolescent female, alert and following commands, breathing comfortably, radial pulse present. Bleeding from lower leg wound — dressing in place, unclear whether bleeding is controlled.
Pt 12: adult, no documentation of respirations. Follows commands, radial pulse present.
